reviews.comment:
No habia nafta super (solo en esta ypf). Para entrar y salir hay unos pozones ENORMES que generan los camiones y no los tapan. En el autoservicio habia mucha fila para q te atiendan. El estacionamiento es incomodo (donde puedas te estacionas), no hay nada delimitado. No la recomiendo. Traten de cargar en trelew o comodoro.

(Translated by Google)
There was no premium gasoline (only at this YPF). The entrance and exit have HUGE potholes created by trucks, and they don't fill them in. There was a very long line at the self-service station. Parking is inconvenient (you park wherever you can), there are no designated areas. I don't recommend it. Try to fill up in Trelew or Comodoro.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfcGJtOWlBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
It has clean restrooms with toilet paper and soap. There's also parking available so you can get out and relax for a while.

reviews.comment:
Historico y muchas veces unico punto de descanso en el camino entre Trelew y Comodoro Rivadavia. Dispone de despacho de combustibles, baños y shop. Si bien es una estacion YPF que ha ido mejorando con el paso de los años, todavia no ha incorporado las ultimas mejoras que ofrece la petrolera en las estaciones. Tener cuidado porque a veces no hay combustible en esta estacion y las mas cercanas podrian estar a 200 km de distancia. Es necesario sumar estacionamiento protegido y ordenar el que ya está disponible

(Translated by Google)
A historic and often the only rest stop on the road between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia. It has a fuel pump, restrooms, and a convenience store. While it's a YPF station that has improved over the years, it hasn't yet incorporated the latest upgrades offered by the oil company. Be aware that this station sometimes runs out of fuel, and the nearest ones could be 200 km away. Secure parking is needed, and the existing parking area should be organized.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfMlpYUlBnEAE

reviews.comment:
Completa estación de servicio en medio de la ruta para cargar combustible y recargar energia. Las tortas fritas en épocas frías son la gloria!!!

(Translated by Google)
A complete service station right on the highway for refueling and recharging. The fried cakes are heavenly in cold weather!
